name: rule-engine closed-loop step config-import flows an ESLint config through the import bridge
command: printf '{"rules":{"no-eval":"error"}}\n' > .eslintrc && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/closed-loop-test.sh" --step config-import --eslintrc .eslintrc --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'imported_rules=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
